name: development-skills
description: Marketplace of development-workflow plugins (spec-driven, board-tracked, TDD build loops).

plugins.name: spec-workflow
plugins.description: Spec-driven autonomous build workflow: GitHub Project board as source of truth, TDD via delegated dev agents, quality gate, checkpoint/handoff loop. Configured per-repo via .claude/project.yaml (versioned schema; legacy project.json still read).

plugins.name: scaffold-project
plugins.description: Scaffolds a new greenfield project's minikube dev-workflow (start/stop/dev/build/port-forward scripts + package.json wiring), with every profile bound explicitly from day one so scaffolded projects never collide on minikube's shared default profile.
